section.heading: Legislative Liaison of the Space Force

subsection.heading: Establishment.—
subsection.content: There is a Legislative Liaison of the Space Force.

subsection.heading: Functions.—
subsection.content: The Legislative Liaison shall perform legislative affairs functions under the direction of the Chief of Space Operations.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 118–31, div. A, title V, § 509B, Dec. 22, 2023, 137 Stat. 243.)
